data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decoupled microservices managing various functionalities such as recommendation engine and payment processing.
data.technical_spec: Each service can be deployed independently using containerization technologies like Docker and managed using Kubernetes.

data.title: Cloud-Native Platform
data.description: Built and operated on cloud infrastructure to ensure scalability and availability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes cloud services such as Amazon Web Services (AWS) for infrastructure needs.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Content is delivered via a global Content Delivery Network to ensure speed and performance.
data.technical_spec: Netflix Open Connect, a purpose-built content delivery network.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Utilizes event streams for data-driven decisions and system integrations.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka is used for handling real-time data streams.

data.title: Resilience Design
data.description: System designed to handle failures gracefully without affecting user experience.
data.technical_spec: Hystrix and other resiliency patterns are used to manage failover mechanisms.
